languages.text: {n}Лицо женщины перекашивает в безумной улыбке.{/n} "Пощадите? Меня? Нет, такие, как я, не нуждаются в пощаде. Я здесь не за этим".
{n}The woman's face contorts into a crazed smile.{/n} "Spare me? No, people like me don't need mercy. That's not what I'm here for."
languages.original_text: {n}Лицо женщины перекашивает в безумной улыбке.{/n} "Пощадите? Меня? Нет, такие, как я, не нуждаются в пощаде. Я здесь не за этим".

traits.locale_text: {n}The woman's face contorts into a crazed smile.{/n} "Spare me? No, people like me don't need mercy. That's not what I'm here for."
{n}The woman's face contorts into a crazed smile.{/n} "Spare me? No, people like me don't need mercy. That's not what I'm here for."
{n}The woman's face contorts into a crazed smile.{/n} "Spare me? No, people like me don't need mercy. That's not what I'm here for."

languages.text: {n}女の顔が狂気じみた笑みにゆがむ。{/n}「私を助けて？いいえ、私のような人間は慈悲を必要としない。それが私の目的ではない。」
languages.original_text: {n}The woman's face contorts into a crazed smile.{/n} "Spare me? No, people like me don't need mercy. That's not what I'm here for."

traits.locale_text: 「私を助けて？いいえ、私のような人間は慈悲を必要としない。それが私の目的ではない。」

languages.text: {n}Kadının yüzü, çılgınca bir gülümsemeyle çarpılıyor.{/n} "Beni bağışlamak mı? Hayır, benim gibi insanların merhamete ihtiyacı yok. Buraya bunun için gelmedim."
languages.original_text: {n}The woman's face contorts into a crazed smile.{/n} "Spare me? No, people like me don't need mercy. That's not what I'm here for."

traits.locale_text: {n}Kadının yüzü, çılgınca bir gülümsemeyle çarpılıyor.{/n} "Beni bağışlamak mı? Hayır, benim gibi insanların merhamete ihtiyacı yok. Buraya bunun için gelmedim."

languages.text: {n}El rostro de la mujer se retuerce en una sonrisa enloquecida.{/n} «¿Perdonarme? No, la gente como yo no necesita piedad. No es eso lo que he venido a buscar».
languages.original_text: {n}The woman's face contorts into a crazed smile.{/n} "Spare me? No, people like me don't need mercy. That's not what I'm here for."

traits.locale_text: {n}El rostro de la mujer se retuerce en una sonrisa enloquecida.{/n} «¿Perdonarme? No, la gente como yo no necesita piedad. No es eso lo que he venido a buscar».

languages.text: {n}女人的脸扭曲出一个疯狂的笑容。{/n}“饶我一命？不，我这种人不需要谁怜悯，我来不是为了求饶的。”
languages.original_text: {n}The woman's face contorts into a crazed smile.{/n} "Spare me? No, people like me don't need mercy. That's not what I'm here for."

traits.locale_text: {n}女人的脸扭曲出一个疯狂的笑容。{/n}“饶我一命？不，我这种人不需要谁怜悯，我来不是为了求饶的。”

languages.text: « M'épargner ? {n}réplique la femme avec un sourire dément.{/n} Non, les gens comme moi n'ont pas besoin de votre clémence. Ce n'est pas pour ça que je suis là. »
languages.original_text: {n}The woman's face contorts into a crazed smile.{/n} "Spare me? No, people like me don't need mercy. That's not what I'm here for."

traits.locale_text: « M'épargner ? {n}réplique la femme avec un sourire dément.{/n} Non, les gens comme moi n'ont pas besoin de votre clémence. Ce n'est pas pour ça que je suis là. »

languages.text: {n}Das Gesicht der Frau verzerrt sich zu einem irren Lächeln.{/n} "Mich verschonen? Nein, Leute wie ich brauchen keine Gnade. Deswegen bin ich nicht hier."
languages.original_text: {n}The woman's face contorts into a crazed smile.{/n} "Spare me? No, people like me don't need mercy. That's not what I'm here for."
